remarks: Welcome to 4 Putnam Hill, Unit 4F, a beautifully renovated one-bedroom residence in the highly desirable Putnam Hill community in Greenwich. This sun-filled home has been fully renovated with tasteful, modern finishes throughout. The updated kitchen features sleek cabinetry, contemporary countertops, and stainless steel appliances, flowing seamlessly into the spacious living and dining area - perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The generously sized bedroom offers ample closet space, while the renovated bath is finished with clean, timeless design. Enjoy low HOA which includes heat & hot water, ample parking for residents and guests, and the convenience of maintenance-free, easy living in a well-maintained complex. Ideally located just minutes to downtown Greenwich, Metro-North, shopping, dining, and major highways, this home offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and accessibility. Move right in and experience turnkey, easy living in one of Greenwich's most convenient locations.
